controls.abstention_policy: Gan 6-month seizure-free threshold; use no seizure frequency reference only when no seizure frequency information is present

hypothesis: Zero-shot direct Gan S0 extraction with synthesis prompt and ladder-matched controls establishes the extraction-only baseline for the few-shot optimizer ladder without compile-time demo cost.
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
No optimizer is used; this arm isolates extraction-only performance on the direct single-pass path under the same synthesis prompt and controls as the ladder optimizer arms.
This capped validation config is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
